begining_of_contract_year.text: ปีที่เริ่มสัญญา

root.sql: select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , trim(sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename)||trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name)||' '||trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname) as member_name , trim(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no)||' '||trim(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name) as member_group , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , extract(year from sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract) as begining_of_contract_year , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance from sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > '0' and extract(year from sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract) = '!begining_of_contract_year!' --and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = '30' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no
